title: strychnos trinervis
intro: Strychnos trinervis, also known as the African strychnine tree or African strychnine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a tree with medicinal properties that contain strychnine, a potent neurotoxin used in small doses to treat various conditions. The plant's bark and seeds have been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, and are believed to have health benefits including analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Strychnos trinervis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in combination with other plants to enhance their medicinal effects.
